# Sahal Imran

> DevOps Engineer at CloudKeeper specializing in cloud cost optimization and FinOps on Microsoft Azure and AWS. Architected a multi-service Azure FinOps platform and a change-detection engine that delivered a verified 12% reduction in enterprise cloud spend.

## About

- Name: Sahal Imran
- Role: DevOps Engineer (Cloud & FinOps)
- Employer: CloudKeeper
- Location: Noida, India
- Focus: Cloud cost optimization, FinOps automation, Kubernetes (AKS), CI/CD
- Core skills: Microsoft Azure, AWS, Kubernetes (AKS), Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, RabbitMQ, Python, Go, Node.js, React, React Native
- Notable result: Delivered and verified a 12% reduction in an enterprise client's monthly cloud spend

## Projects

- [E-commerce Platform](https://github.com/MrSahalImran/ecom-shop): Full-featured e-commerce platform with user authentication and payment processing (React, Node.js, Stripe)
- [LeetLab](https://github.com/MrSahalImran/leetLab): Competitive programming platform with async patterns, microservices, and Judge0 code execution (Node.js, React)
- [Spring Boot BankApp](https://github.com/MrSahalImran/Springboot-BankApp): Secure banking app with DevSecOps practices — Docker, CVE scanning, multi-stage builds
- [Blogify API](https://github.com/MrSahalImran/blogify): Modular backend with JWT auth and role-based access control (Node.js, Express, MongoDB)
